summary.label: Store update pending
summary.message: The status-enabled v2.0.4 build must be published and verified before installed popups can receive live status updates.

policy.verificationCadence: Updated by a maintainer-approved pull request after reports, work progress, or full verification.

history.title: Status-enabled Store build pending
history.summary: The status-enabled v2.0.4 build must be published and verified before installed popups can receive live status updates.

history.title: All supported controls proven working
history.summary: Maintainer smoke review confirmed the supported controls on repository build v2.0.4. This is historical repository evidence, not proof for the currently published Store build.

history.title: Fix launched and current working window restarted
history.summary: The fix shipped on June 4, 2026. From this date through June 27, 2026, the supported controls were treated as working again after daily maintainer verification.

history.title: Breakage verified and fix work started
history.summary: The May 29 reports were confirmed on June 2, 2026, and maintainer fix work started from that verified breakage.

history.title: Breakage reports received
history.summary: Credible reports said Ghostify had broken on supported Meta surfaces, ending the prior green window until the issue was verified and fixed.

history.title: Previous working window began
history.summary: Ghostify was proven working from February 28, 2026 through May 28, 2026, before the May 29 breakage reports.
